tech_news.title: Arch Linux's AUR Sees More Than 400 Packages Compromised With Malware - Phoronix
tech_news.description: The Arch Linux User Repository 'AUR' was hit by a large-scale malware campaign this week with more than 400 of these user-supplied packages being compromised.
